title: Section 23F
content: 1[23F. Advance ruling to be void in certain circumstances.--(1) Where the Authority finds, on a representation made to it by the 2[Principal Commissioner of Central Excise or Commissioner of Central Excise] or otherwise, that an advance ruling pronounced by it under sub-section (6) of 3[Section 23D] has been obtained by the applicant by fraud or misrepresentation of facts, it may, by order, declare such ruling to be void ab initio and thereupon all the provisions of this Act shall apply (after excluding the period beginning with the date of such advance ruling and ending with the date of order under this sub-section) to the applicant as if such advance ruling had never been made. (2) A copy of the order made under sub-section (1) shall be sent to the applicant and the 4[Principal Commissioner of Central Excise or Commissioner of Central Excise].
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 32 of 2003, s. 143. 2. Subs. by Act 25 of 2014, s. 95, for "Commissioner of Central Excise". 3. Subs. by Act 17 of 2013, s. 97, for "Section 28I". 4. Subs. by Act 25 of 2014, s. 95, for "Commissioner of Central Excise".
